name: C2xSecCertificateCreate
title: C2xSecCertificateCreate
description: Generate a new certificate based on another certificate.
The certificate is only valid while the measurement is running and it is automatically discarded afterwards.
The certificate is only known to the real-time part of CANoe. The analysis part only gets knowledge of it when it is transmitted in a message.

parameters.name: originalCertificateHandle
parameters.description: Handle of a certificate which is used as a template.The new certificate inherits all properties of the original certificate except the key pair and those properties specified by the other parameters below.

return: Handle of the new certificate or 0 on failure
